rules.rule_text:
title: Newly Registered Domain
id: 7d092a85-afc7-4c9a-9b7d-fb358a83ca56
description: Newly registered domain, could indicate maliciousness
status: test
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: 2024-08-09
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    category|contains|cased:
    - Newly Observed Domain
    - Newly Registered Domain
    - Newly Registered and Observed Domains
    - Newly Seen Domains
    - newly-registered-domain
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Ads & tracking domains that rotate often to get around adblockers
level: low
